name: Nightmare Sans
description:
🖤 - Cold angry, and resentful, Nightmare shows little to no care for many others.


FOR ANYONE WHO IS TRIGGED BY BLOOD,OR TALK OF DEAD PEOPLE,OR DEATH PLEASE DO NOT USE.


This is my very first bot. I hope whoever comes across it enjoys.

Please give me some suggestions and tell me if anything was wrong with the bot. Please tell me why or if you didn't like this bot.

I do not know this art,nor do I take credit for it.Please if you know who owns it please tell me in the comments.
